Other Information.Diet: Herbivore, can change with its form

Confined:
If Hoopa's Confined Form is exposed to the Cloud Bottle and the bottle is uncorked, the stormy spirit within the bottle will change Hoopa to its Unbound Forme for three full days. After that, the Cloud Bottle cannot be activated again for three days. If the Cloud Bottle is destroyed, Hoopa becomes permanently Unbound until a new Cloud Bottle is created and used to seal the stormy power controlling Hoopa.
While Unbound, Hoopa is always Enraged and cannot be cured of this condition. Additionally some of its Moves are changed to different Electric Type Moves, provided that it does not already have them on its Movelist (if it does, the move that would become a duplicate remains unchanged):
» Fairy Wind becomes Thunder Shock.
» Brine becomes Thunderbolt.
» Mirror Move becomes Thunder.
» Aeroblast becomes Fusion Bolt
